prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为14498→12913→12250→12629→13078，整体呈先降后升的U型走势；2023年达到最低点12250后连续两年回升，2025年基准约13078 名，近2年累计后移约828名；本省物理类计划2021年63人、2022年73人、2023年72人、2024年71人、2025年62人；2026年计划73人，较2025年扩招约17.7 %，计划人数回升至2022年水平，扩招使竞争面扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第30位持续上升至2026年第24位，排名 稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因招生沟通不畅和专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名，但2025年声誉文件中 未出现负面信号；抖音热度总排名第13（高热），食堂话题获高曝光，正面传播效应明显；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、植物保护A、 生物学A、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+，农林学科实力突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热 推荐，与该校电子信息类、计算机类等招生专业匹配；福建省2026年总考生约26.79万人，较2025年增长明显，物理类估算约20.36万人（+6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；中国农业大学位于北京，非福建省本地高校；该校在福建省招生占比约3%-4%，属跨省招生常态比例，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13078名、2026年扩招约17.7%、福建省物理类考生增长约6%、软科排名持续上升及抖音高热曝光等因素，竞争总体加剧；，预测2026年最低位次约14500名，区间14000–15000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 14498 → 12913 → 12250 → 12629 → 13078, showing a U-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; the lowest point was 12250 in 2023, followed by two consecutive years of increase, with a baseline of approximately 13078 in 2025, and a cumulative backward shift of about 828 positions in the last 2 years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 63 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 72 in 2023, 71 in 2024, and 62 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 73, an increase of about 17.7% compared to 2025, returning to the 2022 level, expanding the competition scope.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2024 reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a drop of about 500 positions in the admission score line, but no negative signals appeared in the 2025 reputation document; Douyin heat total ranking 13th (high heat), with cafeteria topics gaining high exposure, showing positive communication effects; the fifth round of discipline evaluation had 7 disciplines at A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, with outstanding agricultural and forestry disciplines highly related to enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, matching the university's enrollment majors like Electronic Information and Computer Science; the total number of examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 203,600 (+6%), expanding the competition; China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Fujian Province; its enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3%-4%, a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio, with no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13078, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 17.7%, the 6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Fujian, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the high Douyin heat exposure, competition overall intensifies; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 14500, with a range of 14000–15000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14000–15000, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors (such as Food Science and Engineering, Economics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Veterinary Medicine), with Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Classes, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 14000), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; for rankings near the upper limit (around 15000), use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Note that 1+3 model majors (Yantai Research Institute) have lower admission rankings and are suitable as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1833 → 1854 → 1869 → 1739 → 2087, fluctuating narrowly within the 1739–2087 range; after reaching the lowest point of 1739 in 2024, it significantly moved back to 2087 in 2025, a backward shift of about 348 places in the past year; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2024, sharply increased to 20 students in 2025, and planned at 14 students in 2026, a 30% reduction compared to 2025, but still higher than the 2021–2024 levels.
3. [University Level] 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, the reputation evaluation was "clearly negative" (admission line plummeted by 500 places), but in 2025, no negative signals for China Agricultural University appeared in the reputation document; Douyin heat total ranking 13th (high heat), with cafeteria topics gaining high exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 7 disciplines rated A- or above, mainly in agriculture and forestry; the History Category enrollment majors (Public Affairs Management, Marketing, E-commerce, Rural Regional Development, Sociology) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category enrollment majors, Business Administration (Marketing) is clearly discouraged, while Public Affairs Management/Sociology have average popularity; in 2026, Fujian Province has about 267,900 total examinees, with History Category estimated at about 64,300 (+6.7%), indicating an expanded examinee pool; China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Fujian Province; its enrollment proportion in Fujian's History Category is extremely small, with no obvious regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2087, the 30% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the approximately 6.7% increase in Fujian's History Category examinees, the enrollment reduction weakens competition but the increase in examinees partially offsets it; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 1731, with a range of 1471–1991.
